productName: Green Revolution Beverage Wildside Shot Orange Cream MAX 1:1 CBC - 2oz
strain: Wildside Shot Orange Cream MAX 1:1 CBC
description: A chef-inspired sweet, juicy orange cannabis drink made for sipping cold, with bright flavor, a clean finish, and a smooth infused lift. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1 ratio. Bright, easy-drinking, and infused for a smooth edible-style experience.
